summary: Plan 06 is executable after Plan 02 and complete Plan 08A: it now defines an atomic complete aws_s3 source registration, isolated optional-extra proofs, bounded spooled download and incremental parsing, pre-allocation JSON token and aggregate-item limits, exact lifecycle ownership, redacted audit-primary failures, CI-exact plugin gates, and offline plus real-S3 acceptance.

review_basis.head: 44ca8f6640523ba79c4d2bb1f866e6199261c671
review_basis.baseline: Current plugin discovery, BaseSource and Azure source contracts, plugin assistance and options-metadata gates, runtime factory, web CompositionState validation, Plan 02 lock ordering, Plan 08 endpoint policy, Plan 10 image imports, and Plan 12 live acceptance.

warnings.detail: Implementation starts only after Plan 02 and complete Plan 08A. Plan 06 must rebase onto Plan 02 and regenerate the combined lockfile; it must not text-merge uv.lock.

The repository currently lacks Wardline trust decorators, so an exit-zero Wardline scan is required but is not represented as decorator coverage. Explicit config, parser, lifecycle, redaction, and audit boundary tests remain load-bearing.
Plan 07 is explicitly not approved by this review and still requires its dedicated repair. Plan 06 approval establishes the shared client, naming, retry, close, and redaction handoff only.

resolved_findings.resolution: Plan 02 lock ownership and Plan 08 pre-registration security ordering are hard dependencies, with rebase plus lock regeneration and no text merge.
Task 2 lands only config and bounded download primitives; the complete BaseSource, parser, audit, catalog, and registration surface lands atomically in Task 3.
Downloads stream through an 8 MiB SpooledTemporaryFile with incremental SHA-256 and exact HEAD, GET, and final-length agreement instead of retaining and joining chunks.
ContentLength, ETag, ContentEncoding, Body, IfMatch, chunk, and close contracts are fail-closed with exact ETag and object-size boundaries.
Provider and recorder failures become static class-only public and audit surfaces outside raw exception handlers, with no retained cause or context.
Success and failure call records are audit-primary; Tier-1 propagation and redacted AuditIntegrityError conversion are specified identically.
The source owns its active download and cached client, closes a suspended generator's spool, detaches before close, and tests reuse, concurrency, early close, external close, and idempotence.
CSV and JSONL use bounded decoded-line readers; JSON places a bounded lexical reader before ijson and a pre-retention aggregate budget in the event builder.
JSON covers selected and ignored huge scalars, many-small-field items, depth, max-1/max/max+1 bounds, UTF encodings, large integers, and non-finite Decimal-to-float overflow.
The public names consistently use AWSS3Source, AWSS3SourceConfig, and AWSS3RowSchema across Plans 00, 06, 07, and 08.
Every registered top-level config field has a concrete description and the source supplies non-empty short agent-assistance hints.
The Plan 08 registration fixture now includes every required SourceSpec and CompositionState field plus real WebSettings and a YamlGenerator-spec mock.
CLI endpoint validation is bounded and Web policy consistently allows omission or explicit null while rejecting every non-null authored override.
Fresh isolated base and standalone aws-extra commands prove lazy optional imports, actionable missing-extra failure, and post-registration discovery without dependency masking.

The atomic registration slice includes complete Azure conformance ports, Hypothesis properties, botocore Stubber and StreamingBody integration, corrected discovery counts, catalog golden, assistance, boundary, and plugin hash gates.
Source hashing occurs after all Task-3 edits, every staged file is explicit, and any Task-4 source correction requires rehashing and restarting all handoff gates.
Plan 10 proves boto3, botocore, and ijson in the lean image; Plan 12 owns a zero-skip real-S3 source test and no longer claims nonexistent live sink coverage.

verification: Loomweave index freshness and live source, discovery, runtime-factory, validation, and contract anchors reconciled
ijson UTF-8, UTF-16, UTF-32 text-stream and Decimal behavior probed in an isolated dependency run
Plan 02 lock ordering and Plans 08, 10, and 12 handoffs reconciled
stale mixed-case names, stale Task-2 registration references, incomplete fixture fields, placeholders, chunk joins, and nonexistent sink-live claims searched
three independent post-repair specialist reviews reached GO with no remaining Plan-06 blocker

review_history.summary: Initial review found dependency and registration-order conflicts, multi-gigabyte buffering risk, raw provider and recorder leakage, incomplete lifecycle and retry semantics, stale naming and hash commands, incomplete fixtures and staging, missing assistance/static/optional-extra gates, post-allocation JSON limits, and missing downstream real-S3 ownership.
